title: solanum lyratum f. xanthocarpum
intro: Solanum lyratum f. xanthocarpum, also known as the white flowered solanum, is a plant species within the Solanum genus. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting respiratory health. Solanum lyratum f. xanthocarpum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments.
